publishedAbstract: * For troubleshooting purposes, it might be required to collect a Fuse Dump of a Gluster FS mount point, to inspect the operations done in this file system. * For on-premise Gluster installations, this require the file system to be unmounted and mounted again, adding the option `--dump-fuse`. * How to execute these steps when the Gluster volume is bound to a persistent volume in Openshift Container Storage?
publishedTitle: How to Collect a FUSE Dump of a Persistent Gluster Volume in Openshift Container Storage?
